The '''Gymsnor-2''' was the second ship in the Gymsnor series produced by [[CorelliSpace]].

Though they were considered obsolete by [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]], some were still in use as late as [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. It was considered difficult to keep them even moderately up-to-date.

==Known ships==
*''[[Scupper Bantoo]]''

==Behind the scenes==
Though it has made at least one novel appearance, technical details for the Gymsnor-2 have only been found in one [[West End Games]] book. The listing was for a Gymsnor-2 with "extensive modifications," and the statistics listed here may differ significantly from a baseline example of the class.

{{Ship-stub}}
